top_strength: Thorough room-by-room inventory capture — systematically worked through every space.
coaching_note: Call was a bare quote with no pricing explanation, no differentiators, no clock, no Save Your Ass — needs to run the full sales framework even when availability is limited.
phone_presence_notes: Arden never used the customer's name and the call was purely transactional — ended abruptly with just a price number and no closing warmth.
